keywords.job: I am a priest. <hicks> The worldly representative of the gods so to speak. <hicks> Not that I would say such a thing of course. <hicks> This would be vanity after all.
keywords.name: I am ... ah, yes, Brewster. That's me, my name I mean <hicks>.
keywords.temple: Hehe! <hicks> Well if you call this hut a temple you are not a devoted churchgoer I guess. But never mind, I won't tell anyone and the gods know it anyway ... if they care.
keywords.king: Ah the king, how lucky he must be - being the ruler of this lovely little piece of dirt here. Hehe.
keywords.venore: Venore, Venore, city of splendour. Hm, the best thing about that city is its brewery.
keywords.thais: Thais!! My beloved hometown! Oh how I miss my good, old Thais.
keywords.carlin: Ha! That's probably even worse than this dump of a jungle here that they call a colony.
keywords.edron: They would never appoint a priest of such a low rank like me to Edron.
keywords.jungle: This jungle must be the way of the gods to give us mortals a taste of hell <hicks>.
keywords.gods: Oh come on, just leave me alone. <hicks> Read a book to find out more.
keywords.tibia: If Tibia is a fallen god, make your guess what bodypart you are on now. <hicks> I have my assumptions ... but I won't tell. Hehe.
keywords.kazordoon: The dwarves I met can't stop to praise the dwarven beer. That wakes the urge in me to ... uhm spread the word of our gods in that city of Kazordoon.
keywords.dwarves: The dwarves I met can't stop to praise the dwarven beer. That wakes the urge in me to ... uhm spread the word of our gods in that city of Kazordoon.
keywords.dwarfs: The dwarves I met can't stop to praise the dwarven beer. That wakes the urge in me to ... uhm spread the word of our gods in that city of Kazordoon.
keywords.ab\u0027dendriel: Was never there <hicks> For all what I have heard it's not that much different from this ugly little settlement.
keywords.elves: After being in that jungle for a while, I can't trust people that love trees anymore.
keywords.elfs: After being in that jungle for a while, I can't trust people that love trees anymore.
keywords.darama: The teachings of our temple counts little on this continent. I think it's a sign from the gods to abandon it. But why should anyone listen to poor old Brewster?
keywords.ankrahmun: Just to think about this cursed town and its inhabitants makes me shiver. I better take a quick drink to forget about it.
keywords.ferumbras: <hicks> Oh well, he is just that what I'd expect next in all my misery.
keywords.excalibug: Who knows if it is real or just some myth? <hicks> And who cares at all?
keywords.apes: They don't believe me but I have seen them. There are pink apes! They come when I am sleeping and try to steal my beer and wine <hicks>.
keywords.lizard: They usually stay away from here so who cares?
keywords.dworcs: Heard enough of them to dislike them.
keywords.cough: The only person who might have some cough syrup is this druid Ustan. You find him in the tavern. Hmmm the tavern ... <hicks>
keywords.syrup: The only person who might have some cough syrup is this druid Ustan. You find him in the tavern. Hmmm the tavern ... <hicks>
keywords.help: You are burning my child. I will help you.
keywords.blessing: There are five different blessings available in five sacred places. These blessings are: the spiritual shielding, the spark of the phoenix, the embrace of Tibia, the fire of the suns and the wisdom of solitude.
keywords.pilgrimage: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your vital force is damaged. Each one of the five blessings will reduce this damage.
keywords.ashes: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your vital force is damaged. Each one of the five blessings will reduce this damage.
keywords.spiritual: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.shielding: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.sacred: Just tell me in which of the five blessings you are interested.
keywords.places: Just tell me in which of the five blessings you are interested.
keywords.spark: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.phoenix: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.embrace: The druids north of Carlin can provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
keywords.fire: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.suns: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.wisdom: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.solitude: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

texts: I am a priest. <hicks> The worldly representative of the gods so to speak. <hicks> Not that I would say such a thing of course. <hicks> This would be vanity after all.
